pi_items.source: Cross-referenced with task_utils.sh (CHINOOK_DB variable), setup_task.sh, and README.md evidence documentation. Confirmed as the standard container-internal path for the Chinook database.
Verified in README.md fresh test evidence (2026-01-27) showing 'connection_name': 'Chinook' with 'exact_name_match': true. Case-sensitive requirement confirmed.
File type verification: 'SQLite 3.x database, last written using SQLite version 3007006'. Database schema confirmed as valid SQLite with standard Chinook tables.
Verifier.py line 44 and 98-104 explicitly requires exact name match. README.md security notes confirm this is a critical requirement to block adversarial scenarios.
Task description states: 'expand it in the Database Navigator to verify it works - you should see Tables, Views, and other database objects.' Verifier.py checks for connection_expanded state.

Chinook database is the official SQLite sample database from https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database. Contains real music industry data (artists, albums, tracks, customers, invoices). Documentation available at https://www.sqlitetutorial.net/sqlite-sample-database/

Direct database query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' returns 13. Includes 11 data tables (albums, artists, customers, employees, genres, invoice_items, invoices, media_types, playlist_track, playlists, tracks) plus 2 SQLite system tables (sqlite_sequence, sqlite_stat1).
Direct database query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM artists. Matches README.md evidence documentation.
Direct database query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM albums. Matches README.md evidence documentation.
Direct database query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers. Matches README.md evidence documentation.
Direct database query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employees. Matches README.md evidence documentation.
Direct database query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM invoices. Matches README.md evidence documentation.
Direct database query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tracks. Matches README.md evidence documentation.

Direct database query using join through albums to artists: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tracks t JOIN albums al ON t.AlbumId = al.AlbumId JOIN artists a ON al.ArtistId = a.ArtistId WHERE a.Name = 'AC/DC'. Matches README.md evidence documentation and verifier expectations.

pi_items.verified_value: luisg@embraer.com.br, leonekohler@surfeu.de, ftremblay@gmail.com, eduardo@woodstock.com.br, dmiller@comcast.com, edfrancis@yachoo.ca, enrique_munoz@yahoo.es, puja_srivastava@yahoo.in
pi_items.source: Direct database queries confirm all 8 known customer email addresses exist. Note: Customer 50 (Enrique Muñoz) has email 'enrique_munoz@yahoo.es' in the actual database, not 'enrique_munoz@mail.com' as noted in README.md.

pi_items.verified_value: For Those About To Rock (We Salute You), Put The Finger On You, Let's Get It Up, Inject The Venom, Snowballed, Evil Walks, C.O.D., Breaking The Rules, Night Of The Long Knives, Spellbound, Go Down, Dog Eat Dog, Let There Be Rock, Bad Boy Boogie, Problem Child, Overdose, Hell Ain't A Bad Place To Be, Whole Lotta Rosie
pi_items.source: Direct database query: SELECT t.Name FROM tracks t JOIN albums al ON t.AlbumId = al.AlbumId JOIN artists a ON al.ArtistId = a.ArtistId WHERE a.Name = 'AC/DC'. All 7 tracks mentioned in README.md are present in the database.

privileged_info_summary: The connect_to_database task verifies successful creation of a SQLite database connection in DBeaver. The Chinook database is a real, public sample database representing a digital media store with 11 data tables: artists (275 records), albums (347), customers (59), employees (8), genres, invoices (412), invoice_items, media_types, tracks (3503), playlists, and playlist_track. The expected database path is /home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook.db, and the connection must be named exactly 'Chinook' (case-sensitive) and expanded to display database objects. All metadata claims are accurate and verified against both the actual database file and official documentation.
